clean_text:
Consumer Loans | INECOBANK
Section: Consumer Loans
[Product: 1 CLICK Online Loan]
Borrow up to 15 mln AMD from Inecobank within a few minutes with just a 1 CLICK, without guarantees and additional documentation requirements. You can apply for the loan either through InecoMobile or InecoOnline system at any time of the day, seven days a week.
Tags: Without Deposit
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/1-click
Apply URL: https://www.sprintonline.am/sign-in/?language=en
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/974e3255-a/385x250_ nominal interest rate.jpg
[Product: Pledge Secured Loans]
Use your movable and immovable property as a pledge and apply for a consumer loan in Inecobank - trouble free and without income statement documentation.
Tags: Pledge Secured
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/secured-consumer-loan
Apply URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/applications/apply?type=consumer-loan
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/3101972e-a/Pledge_Secured_Loans.png
[Product: Deposit Secured Consumer Loans]
Apply for deposit secured consumer loans in Inecobank. Get a loan up to 90% of your deposit amount at the same time retaining the interest accrued on the deposit account.
Tags: Pledge Secured
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/deposit-secured
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/c84284da-8/Deposit_Secured_Loans.png
[Product: Gold Secured Consumer Loans]
Apply for Gold Secured consumer loans at any branch of Inecobank. Select the most convenient option for you and receive up to 150% loan of the estimated value of gold.
Tags: Pledge Secured
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/gold-pledge-secured
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/1d8febd4-5/Gold_Pledge_Secured_Loans.png
